message:
feat: Implement remaining TODO stubs - all c_interop TODOs complete

classobject.zig:
- method_getset: __func__ and __self__ getter descriptors
- method_memberlist: T_OBJECT_EX members for im_func, im_self

codeobject.zig:
- code_getsetlist: co_varnames, co_cellvars, co_freevars, co_code getters
- code_memberlist: All 14 code object members (co_argcount, co_flags, etc.)

bytesio.zig:
- bytesio_as_buffer: Full buffer protocol (bf_getbuffer, bf_releasebuffer)
- Tracks export count for safe buffer management

Reduces TODO count from 7 to 0 - all c_interop/src TODOs eliminated!
